concerns: Step 5: Adding react-router-dom will break existing layout-shell.test.tsx — tests assert `<a>` tags with href attributes in Nav. Plan must include updating those tests after converting to `<Link>`.
Step 5: Missing sub-step to configure Vite dev server SPA fallback (`server: { historyApiFallback: true }` or equivalent) so /browse doesn't 404 on refresh during development.
Step 5: Missing Vercel rewrite config (vercel.json `rewrites` rule `{ source: "/(.*)", destination: "/index.html" }`) for production SPA routing.

Risk: CardVisual has `max-width: 420px` — in a dense 57-card grid this may cause cards to look too wide or inconsistent. Plan step 2 should account for overriding or constraining card width within the grid context.
Step 6: Test for 'all 57 cards render' couples the test to current dataset size. Consider asserting `cardDeck.length` dynamically rather than hardcoding 57.
